title: Dietary Pattern Tracking Log
description: Track your daily dietary patterns alongside mood and energy to discover which eating habits best support your mental health. Based on Mediterranean Diet Adherence and Dietary Inflammatory Index research.
instructions: Complete this log daily. Focus on overall dietary patterns rather than calorie counting. Research shows that tracking dietary patterns for 2-4 weeks reveals meaningful mood connections.

fields.label: Did you eat whole grains today?
Did you eat fish or omega-3 rich foods today?
How much ultra-processed food did you eat today?
How many meals were home-cooked today?
How steady was your energy today?
What did you notice about your food-mood connection today?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Energy was much steadier after switching to whole grain bread at lunch

disclaimer: This tracking log is for educational pattern recognition, not calorie counting or restrictive eating. If tracking food triggers anxiety or disordered eating behaviors, please stop and consult a healthcare provider. If you are in crisis, call or text 988.
